programs.title: Wheeler Dealers 4
programs.desc: Mike Brewer and Edd China struggle to restore a damaged car.They try to renovate and sell used vehicles of various brands at a profit.

programs.title: Misfit Garage 2
programs.desc: The team of mechanics from Fired-Up Garage takes on new challenges.In the meantime, they also have to face completely different problems, such as the theft of tools.Working together gives them a lot of satisfaction.

programs.title: Road absurdities
programs.desc: Krzysztof Ruszała and Kamil Jaśkowski track down examples of solutions that make life difficult for drivers, including:indicate incorrectly positioned characters.

programs.title: Steel Buddies
programs.desc: Michael Manousakis and his mechanics from the Morlock Motors workshop will not despise any military vehicle.These are enthusiasts who can boast a long list of projects.

programs.title: Kindig Customs
programs.sub_title: Is this what we had in mind?
programs.desc: Dave Kindig runs the Kindig-It Design workshop.It designs, builds and modifies various vehicles for demanding customers.Creates unique machines.
